Risk Description: Because of repeated defect reopenings and multiple retesting cycles observed in Sprints 1-8, there is a risk that QA costs will continue to exceed budget, which could lead to financial loss and delayed delivery.

Because of recurring environment access and external dependency delays documented in both JIRA and metrics reports, there is a risk that integration and production support tasks will be delayed, which could lead to SLA breach and delayed go-live.

Because developer utilization reached 82% (above 80%) due to high PR fix and support workload, there is a risk that sustained overutilization will cause resource fatigue, which could lead to reduced quality or increased defect rates in future sprints.
